zh.lifeSummary: 當Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun於大約1200年出生在法國薩特時，她的父親Guillaume des ROCHES47歲，母親Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé22歲。她於1219年6月22日與Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1259年9月在法國艾-吉洛易a奧度享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun于大约1200年出生在法国薩特时，她的父亲Guillaume des ROCHES47岁，母亲Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé22岁。她于1219年6月22日与Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1259年9月在法国艾-吉洛易a奧度享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: des
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Indian: variant of   Deo  . In Maharashtra, Konkanastha Brahmins have a clan called Dev.

variants.name: Deo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ravindra, Sohini, Vivek, Ajay, Alok, Anil, Annapurna, Daya, Ganga, Goutam, Harnek, Indra.

Indian (northern states): from Sanskrit deva ‘deity, lord’. This was a title used by ruling families in northern India. There is a Jat tribe called Deo. In northeastern India this name is spelled and pronounced Deb . Elsewhere, a common variant is Dev .
Italian: from a short form of the personal names Amadeo, Laudadeo, or Sperindeo, of which only the first now remains in use as a personal name.

nameMeanings.name: Roches,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  Norman, English: locative name from Les Roches in Seine-Maritime (Normandy). In 1297 John de Roches held the manor of (East) Winterslow in Wilts (later known as Roche Court). Any of the following post-medieval bearers may alternatively belong under (2).  See also  Roche  .
2 English: variant of Roche with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Roche
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aidan, Declan, Eamonn, Fergus, Fionnuala, Kevin Patrick, Liam.
Irish (Munster) and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Roach  . Compare   Roch  .

French: topographic name for someone who lived by a rocky outcrop or crag, from Old French roche ‘rock’. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of the variant Laroche 2. Compare Deroche .

nameMeanings.name: Clémence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval French and English form of Latin Clementia, a derivative of Clemens ( see Clement ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘mercy’. It was fairly popular in Britain from the late medieval period until the 17th century, but has since been used less often.

en.lifeSummary: When Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun was born about 1200, in Sarthe, France, her father, Guillaume des ROCHES, was 47 and her mother, Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé, was 22. She married Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun on 22 June 1219. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in September 1259, in Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, France, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun est née environ 1200, à Sarthe, France, son père, Guillaume des ROCHES, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun le 22 juin 1219. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en septembre 1259, à Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, France, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun um 1200 in Sarthe, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume des ROCHES 47 und ihre Mutter Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé 22. Sie hat am 22. Juni 1219 Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb im September 1259 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun è nata il circa 1200 nel Sarthe, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume des ROCHES, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun il 22 giugno 1219. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel settembre 1259, nel Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Francia, all'età di 60 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun(이)가 대략 1200년 프랑스 사르테에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume des ROCHES(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1219년 6월 22일 Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1259년 9월 프랑스 우레-트-로이르 cha테오던에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun nasceu aproximadamente 1200, em Sarthe, França, seu pai, Guillaume des ROCHES, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun em 22 de junho de 1219. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em setembro de 1259, em Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, França, com 60 anos.

ru.Écouflant, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Lo: eкоуфлант, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun родилась около 1200 г. в местности сарт, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume des ROCHES было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun 22 июня 1219 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла сентябрь 1259 г. в местности чaтодун, эуре-ет-лоир, Франция в возрасте 60 лет.

Se casó con Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun el 22 de junio de 1219. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en septiembre de 1259, en Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Francia, a la edad de 60 años.
